errors.evidence: Output value: "Demon Hunter, Druid, Mage, Paladin, Priest"
errors.description: The agent incorrectly identified class roles and abilities, failing to account for armor type constraints (two plate, two cloth) and misattributing class abilities (e.g., including Demon Hunter/Mage instead of Death Knight/Hunter).
errors.impact: Produced an entirely wrong answer that contradicts the true answer and class mechanics.

errors.impact: Resulted in incorrect class selections due to unverified assumptions.
